heading: Vacancies during recess of Senate
label: 245 Vacancies during recess of Senate
text: The President shall have power to fill all vacancies that may happen on the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System during the recess of the Senate by granting commissions which shall expire with the next session of the Senate.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of fifth par. of section 10 of act . For classification to this title of other pars. of section 10, see Codification note set out under .Dec. 23, 1913section 241 of this title
Change of NameSection 203(a) of act , changed name of Federal Reserve Board to Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.Aug. 23, 1935
